author: 星街すいせい
text:
星をみる少女 / 星街すいせい (official)
Starring & Vocals：Hoshimachi Suisei
Lyrics ＆ Composed ＆ Arranged by HarumakiGohan
Mixed by NNZN
Mastered by Shiba Akihiro (TEMAS)

⇩2026.6.30『星をみる少女』リリース🎧
https://cover.lnk.to/D7nl56
